data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁 #39
data.summary: [4/29 (Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-g
data.body:
[4/29 (Tue) Ban Notice]  

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total Assault and the transaction system. 

▶ Total number of players banned: 10
▶ Period: Permanent 
▶ More details:
